title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
